description: Google has been pretty good at blocking programmatic requests even for non-commercial, self-archival purposes and ScraperAPI has been extremely effective and getting around those. While getting the requests routed through ScraperAPI has been much slower than say, routing it through one of the free proxy servers,
author: Arun K.
pros: The ease of use and the fact that there were multiple ways of using it made this desirable. The simple API usage let me prototype and decide what element I need to look for, and used the proxy method in the software to make the integration seamless.
cons: ScraperAPI does not allow for web elements to be rendered, at least not until I am on the most expensive plan. While this has not been limiting so far, the lack of this feature has led me to use ScraperAPI along with other proxy methods as opposed to using ScraperAPI exclusively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Value to access web pages behind protection for a decent price
description: We are a Data Acquisition company, Due to our scale we were struggling to build and maintain inhouse solutions to avoid bot detection. The proxy service such as Luminati are impossible for us to afford and we cannot also hire a developer to work on our in-house solution. Scraper API provides us with an easy to use scraping option for tougher sites without any commitment in a fraction of cost.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that I am able to access Amazon, g2.com, or any website with protection with even the basic package without JS. This allows to do data acquisition faster and at cheaper rates. Also, I like the pricing models(no commitments), 29 USD for 250k requests which serves our purpose perfectly. Also, Shout out to [SENSITIVE CONTENT] in support who helped to resolve a billing issue in a day.
cons: I wish they allowed the remaining credits to be rolled over to the next month. If this is implemented, it would even provide a lot of value to startups such as ours

review_title: Prices increased by 1000% and quality degraded like crazy
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Back in the day it was the cheapest scraping provider, they charged by request no matter if you used JS or not.
cons: I couldn't use up my credits any more because over 80% of the requests were failing.

review_title: Why pay a lot of money for manufacturer APIs when there is ScraperAPI?
description: If I review my ScraperAPI experience, I can come to the conclusion that it is great software for me and my company.
author: Emre K.
pros: ScraperAPI's cheap price and variety of API services are my favorite features.
cons: My least favorite feature of ScraperAPI is that some APIs are too restrictive.

author: Michael W.
pros: We use this tool to scrape publically available profiles on Instagram and it has worked wonderfully for most of the time. The price is also cheaper than other scrapers I've found and/or use. There are times when the success drops, but they never charge for failures and always work on a fix. Unfortunately, right now is one of the times with a low success rate, but it still works whereas the other scraper I tried didn't work at all (to be fair I didn't contact them about it, so as to give them an opportunity to fix it). Thank you for always working on this, and I hope to be able to use this tool for as long as we require this data for our product. :)
cons: The thing I like the least is the low success times (we only have this issue with Instagram).

description: It allowed us to access lots of information that are related to our business and helped us with the categorization of these information
author: Amin M.
pros: The documentations are very simple and crystal clear. The ability to rotate IP's from using multiple jeo locations. The ability to render javascript which makes is feasible with SPAs ( single page applications ) Notification once the usage reaches to 50% of the package quota
cons: Only the ability to bypass the captacha tokens or any anti-scraping mechanism

review_title: My API for Amazon, Booking and others
description: I use it daily on various projects and it has never failed. Customer service is attentive and fast.
author: Eusebio B.
pros: I try a lot of scraper software, but this is the best value for money. It works, which is what really matters.
cons: It would be great to have more auto extractors of information like they do with Amazon.

description: its good but pricing is high
author: Rohit G.
pros: Its able to function easily and easy to implement for a developer
cons: Multi national support is on a very priced pla. I am not able to use it for client level purpose

description: Honestly I love ScraperAPI. It makes my world easy. I have been wanting to build a search engine for years but was discouraged when my traditional crawlers were blocked. I saw Scrapper and the whole story changed.
author: Adeyeye G.
pros: I love the IP rotation features because it gives my crawlers great power to crawl any data without having the fear of being blocked.
cons: Some web pages do contains honey pots. ScraperAPI cannot detect honey pot links which is not very satisfactory. If honey pot links could be detected... It will be a very great deal.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best Proxy Solution! in the market right now
author: Shekhor B.
pros: I have been using ScraperAPI for last 2 years ro so. They were not flawless in the beginning, but they were always willing to work based on the clients feedback and tweak their infrastructure to fix the issue. The thing I liked the most: 1. Auto Proxy Rotation 2. Auto CAPTCHA Handling 3. JS Rendering 4. Geo Location Targeting Moreover, then don't charge extra for scpraing the data from the premium site like Amazon, Google etc. where the competitors do so.
cons: To be honest I have always been a big fan of theirs so couldn't say anything negative on them. But the monthly commitment is what I don't like that much. Its because, sometimes I might need their service, sometimes not. So pay per go plan with a reasonable price will be the best option. Or a monthly commitment with rollover credit will work too.

review_title: Value for money, does its job well
author: Alexey L.
pros: It simple and just works. On top of that, you can ask support to implement filtering of some responses that should not be considered valid parsed responses.
cons: Sometimes pages with errors and captchas are returned as successful results. However, this can be fixed if you ask the support.

review_title: Very simple to use and works perfectly
description: We are able to focus on our business objectives without being distracted by all the intricacies that go along with scraping. ScraperAPI just does it.

pros: I loved how many features are bundled "behind the scenes" to ensure that my web scraping works without interruption. I don't need to worry about IP rotation and captcha and user agents - they handle it all.
cons: Haven't really run into any problems at this point. It worked exactly as I hoped.

description: Overall experience is good and I would definitely refer it as a great web scraping solution. The free tier itself grants you quite large number of requests, the paid version will do wonders!

pros: Very easy implementation. Works very similar to the existing requests library of Python. Works exactly as it has been advertised and was successfully able to surpass various security/bot protection programs. Customer support is quick and efficient and they work to resolve your issues.
cons: No cons that I have come across as of now. They provide the exact features that are advertised so there's no misleading the users.

review_title: Reliable rotating IP service with low price and responsive and helpful support team
description: Overall very positive experience with ScraperAPI and have been a customer for 2 years +. Always pleased with my interactions with the support team and their response time and their efforts to help.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - The URL encoding is fairly straightforward to implement and maintain - The support team is quick to respond and support on any issues that come up - The pricing is very reasonable and they give a lot of queries vs other providers - was able to upgrade, downgrade, or pause subscription without any issues
cons: - there are a few websites where it didn't work for me, e.g Tesco.com - the IP locations were not always accurate, e.g set to USA, and still see China, or Malaysia etc appearing as the location on Amazon.com

review_title: Great API service with good value
description: Overall, I would still say my experience with ScraperAPI is positive. I've been able to save a lot of time collecting data, and the auto parsing feature has been a great help. I didn't get a 100% success rate, but I'm pretty sure I wouldn't be able to get it anywhere else any way.
author: Thien D.
pros: What I like most about ScraperAPI is its ease of use. The documentation gets me up and running in no time and the sample code is highly illustrative. I also feel like they offer the best value as I had to do a lot of web scraping in a short amount of time, and the pricing scheme is flexible enough to accommodate my changing need for the service. I did shop around and while other providers offer comparable prices (or perhaps even a little bit cheaper), I just stick with ScraperAPI as I got used to its interface. I have had good results in highly readable format most of the time. The customer support team is also quick in replying my emails.
cons: Even with the Business subscription, I don't always get the data I needed. But I'm sure this is a challenge to which there's no quick-and-easy solution just yet. JSON auto parsing is a really nice feature but currently is offered on a limited number of websites. I also think residential proxy is a little bit pricy relative to its value, because even with residential proxy activated, I still got blocked sometimes.

description: Easy to use and doesn't charge for failed requests, that's really helpful.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This software is very easy to use and covers all the popular programming languages. So we don't have to adapt our program to languages that are only available at service providers. And scraperAPI is widely used by YouTubers tutors for Computer Science as the provider chosen for practice, making it easier to use.
cons: Sometimes there are errors in testing the API Testing Daily Summary without a detailed explanation of the problem.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
